CVE-2024-32258.title: The network server of fceux 2.7.0 has a path traversal vulnerabil ...
CVE-2024-32258.description: The network server of fceux 2.7.0 has a path traversal vulnerability, allowing attackers to overwrite any files on the server without authentication by fake ROM.
